name: Next Level STJ
description: Next Level STJ is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Saint James, MN. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. Amenities include water, restrooms, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are private.
open_play_schedule: Call or text 507-380-5294 to reserve court. Building is accessible 24/7
fees: Private — Court fee is $25/Hour. Call or text to reserve court and gain access to building.
